message:
fix(harness,vdbe,wal): extension test refinements, VDBE engine fix, and WAL FEC corrections

- bd_t6sv2_14 test: adjust compatibility matrix test assertions
- engine.rs: additional MVCC concurrent context handling
- wal_fec.rs: forward error correction calculation fixes
